title: Daily Memo: Trump Questions NATO
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
End of an era? In an interview published by the Telegraph on Wednesday, U.S. President Donald Trump threatened to pull the United States out of NATO. He accused NATO allies of not supporting the U.S. in Iran despite Washington’s assistance to Europe in the Russia-Ukraine war. Responding to the comments, the British prime minister said […]

The post Daily Memo: Trump Questions NATO appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
End of an era? In an interview published by the Telegraph on Wednesday, U.S. President Donald Trump threatened to pull the United States out of NATO. He accused NATO allies of not supporting the U.S. in Iran despite Washington’s assistance to Europe in the Russia-Ukraine war. Responding to the comments, the British prime minister said […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years. GPF is non-ideological, analyzes the world and forecasts the future using geopolitics: political, economic, military and geographic dimensions at the foundation of a nation.
